generate_prefill.description: Chroma generate prefill: prompt construction, first thinker injection, backbone logits, and flat caches.

backbone_frame_step.description: One Chroma audio-frame-only backbone generation step with flat K/V cache inputs and outputs.

backbone_thinker_step.description: One Chroma backbone step that appends an audio frame and injects the next thinker token pair.

decoder_prefill.description: Cacheful Chroma depth decoder prefill for codebook-0 plus backbone hidden state.

decoder_step.description: One cacheful Chroma depth decoder step for subsequent audio codebooks.

s2s_merged.description: Resident merged S2S graph with prefixed disconnected component subgraphs.

capabilities.note: Safetensor-backed S2S graph bundle for greedy Chroma generation. Python is intended only for offline comparison.
